notes: Clarifies Seasonal as one automatic Pathmark theme that follows the current Southern Hemisphere season.
Adds stable Pathmark themes based on primary, secondary and tertiary colour families.
Keeps Streamlit responsible for Light, Dark and System while Pathmark only applies accent styling.
Updates the Theme tab wording so users are not asked to pick individual seasons.
release_notes: Seasonal is now one automatic theme, with stable primary, secondary and tertiary colour-family themes available alongside it.
label: Accent theme system clarification
